scripts.test:rust: npm run prepare:7z && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.tauri:dev: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && npm run prepare:7z && tauri dev
scripts.tauri:build: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && npm run prepare:7z && tauri build
scripts.b: git fetch && git switch beta && npm run vi
scripts.r: git switch main && npm run vi && npm run gitprune:force
scripts.u: npm update && npm run release:prepare && npm run format && npm run test:all
scripts.win-compiler:arm64: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoExit -Command "& 'C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\Common7\Tools\Launch-VsDevShell.ps1' -SkipAutomaticLocation -Arch arm64 -HostArch amd64"
scripts.build:win:x64: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && npm run prepare:7z && dotenv -e .env -- tauri build --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --bundles nsis
scripts.build:win:arm64: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && npm run prepare:7z && dotenv -e .env -- tauri build --target aarch64-pc-windows-msvc --bundles nsis
scripts.build:win: npm run build:win:x64 && npm run build:win:arm64
scripts.build:mac:universal: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && npm run prepare:7z && dotenv -e .env -- tauri build --target universal-apple-darwin --bundles dmg,app
scripts.build:linux:x64: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && npm run prepare:7z && dotenv -e .env -- tauri build --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --bundles appimage,deb,rpm
scripts.build:linux:arm64: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && npm run prepare:7z && dotenv -e .env -- tauri build --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu --bundles appimage,deb,rpm
scripts.build:linux: npm run build:linux:x64 && npm run build:linux:arm64
scripts.flatpak:bundle: flatpak-builder --repo=flatpak-repo --force-clean flatpak-build run.rosie.zinnia.yml && flatpak build-bundle flatpak-repo dist/Zinnia-Linux.flatpak run.rosie.zinnia
scripts.release:prepare: npm i && npm run sync-version && cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -q && npm run dist:clean-release-artifacts && node scripts/update-metainfo.js
scripts.release:finalize: dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/post-release-assets.js && git fetch origin && git reset --hard @{u} && git clean -fd
scripts.release:win: npm run release:prepare && npm run build:win && npm run release:sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:mac: npm run release:prepare && npm run build:mac:universal && npm run build:mac:zip && npm run release:sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:mac:ssh: npm run mac:ssh:keychain && npm run release:mac
scripts.release:linux: npm run release:prepare && npm run build:linux && npm run flatpak:clean && npm run flatpak:bundle && npm run release:sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:linux:x64: npm run release:prepare && npm run build:linux:x64 && npm run flatpak:clean && npm run flatpak:bundle && npm run release:sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:linux:arm64: npm run release:prepare && npm run build:linux:arm64 && npm run flatpak:clean && npm run flatpak:bundle && npm run release:sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.setup:deb: sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y build-essential curl wget file libgtk-3-dev libwebkit2gtk-4.1-dev libjavascriptcoregtk-4.1-dev libsoup-3.0-dev libglib2.0-dev libssl-dev libayatana-appindicator3-dev librsvg2-dev patchelf flatpak flatpak-builder && sudo flatpak remote-add --if-not-exists flathub https://flathub.org/repo/flathub.flatpakrepo && sudo flatpak install -y flathub org.gnome.Platform//48 org.gnome.Sdk//48 org.freedesktop.Sdk.Extension.node22//24.08 org.freedesktop.Sdk.Extension.rust-stable//24.08
